data.title: Tether Launches TradeFi To Enhance Global Trade Efficiency
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether's CEO Paolo Ardoino has announced the launch of TradeFi, a new service aimed at enhancing global trade through innovative financing solutions. This addition expands Tether's growing portfolio, which already includes stablecoins, asset tokenization, and wallet development tools. TradeFi is designed to streamline international trade by offering cost-reducing and efficiency-boosting financing solutions. The platform will facilitate the trading of major commodities such as crude oil and copper, utilizing USDT for seamless settlement. Tether's website states, "With the support of blockchain technology, we are simplifying trade processes, reducing costs, and promoting financial inclusion across industries and borders." The launch of TradeFi follows Tether's initial crude oil transaction last November, where the company financed a $45 million deal involving 670,000 barrels of oil in the Middle East. While details of the participating companies were not disclosed, Ardoino described this as the first step in a broader strategy to support more commodities and industries.

data.title: The PAIN team-related addresses have sold $2.53 million worth of tokens in the past 7 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the PAIN team-related address has sold tokens worth $2.53 million in the past 7 hours.
The address DjTrV...1a24a sold 107,212 PAIN at an average price of $23.66. The source of its funds was traced back to the team's pre-sale related address, not the 20% coin holding address for the airdrop. The tokens were transferred three times before shipment.

data.title: OKX: Mining software Bom is suspected of malicious activities, and assets in potential risk addresses need to be transferred as soon as possible
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OKX officials said that the OKX Web3 security team has recently received a large number of user feedback. After interviews, it was found that some of the stolen users had downloaded a mining software called "Bom". After analysis, the software has the logic of uploading user albums, which is suspected of malicious behavior. 
It reminds people not to download software from unknown sources (including so-called "wool-pulling tools"); keep the mnemonic properly, and it is strictly forbidden to take pictures or screenshots. The OKX mobile wallet has completely banned this operation. Please be vigilant and transfer assets to risky addresses as soon as possible.

data.title: PAIN: Harold’s token share will be locked for 20 years, pre-sale airdrop has started
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Solana Chain Meme Coin PAIN posted on X that, as promised before, 80% of the 185,976 SOL raised have been refunded, and all funds sent after block 318346069 (i.e. the end of PAINSALE) have also been refunded. Harold's token share will be locked for 20 years until it is unlocked in 2045.
Its token economic model shows that the total supply of PAIN is 10 million, of which 50% is allocated to Harold himself, 20% for pre-sale, 15% for liquidity, 10% for the community, and 5% for partners.
In addition, the pre-sale airdrop has been opened.

data.title: UK Police Arrest Two Men in Cryptocurrency Fraud Case
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, UK authorities have arrested and charged two men in connection with a cryptocurrency scam targeting a 75-year-old retiree from Aberdeenshire. The victim reportedly suffered a six-figure financial loss due to the fraud.

The case was reported in July 2024, prompting an investigation by the Northeast Division of the Scottish Police, in collaboration with West Midlands Police and South Yorkshire Police. A 54-year-old man was apprehended in Coventry, while a 36-year-old man was arrested in Mexborough. Both individuals were charged on the day of their arrest.

data.title: Ethereum NFT game Fantasy Top has been launched on Monad testnet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ethereum NFT game Fantasy Top announced on X that the free version of the game has been launched on the L1 blockchain Monad testnet.

data.title: UK police charge two people with running cryptocurrency scam
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News British police arrested and charged two men for suspected cryptocurrency fraud, causing a 75-year-old Aberdeenshire retiree to lose six figures.
The male victim reported the fraud in July 2024, and the Scottish police immediately launched an investigation. Officers from the Northeast Division of the police went to England yesterday to make arrests and cooperated with the West Midlands and South Yorkshire police. They arrested a 54-year-old man in Coventry and a 36-year-old man in Mixborough, both of whom were charged on the same day.
In a statement about the arrest, Detective Sergeant David Williamson of the Northeast Division Cyber ​​Crime Team warned the public to "be wary of activities that appear to be fraudulent and report them to the police." (Decrypt)

data.title: DeFi Festival Anticipated To Spark Prolonged Growth In Cryptocurrency Sector
data.description:
According to Odaily, Charles d’Haussy, CEO of the dYdX Foundation, shared insights during an interview at the Consensus 2025 conference in Hong Kong. He suggested that the cryptocurrency industry might experience a "DeFi Festival" as early as September, potentially leading to a prolonged surge in decentralized finance (DeFi) activities. 

D’Haussy expressed that the term "DeFi Summer" is insufficient to describe the anticipated upward trend, proposing "DeFi Festival" as a more fitting description due to its expected extended growth. He remarked, "In people's minds, DeFi Summer was like a three-month wild party. I believe that brief period is over. What follows will be a long-lasting party spanning several months."

Data from Steno Research indicates that the DeFi Summer began in 2020, marked by a significant increase in market adoption and a total value locked (TVL) surge to $15 billion. However, this momentum cooled during the bear market of 2022.
